notes: The Extron.com product page and official datasheet PDF (TLP_Pro_1025T_6090-D6.pdf) returned bot-protection errors and could not be fetched directly. Specifications confirmed via multiple secondary sources (mlvteknologi.com, creationnetworks.net, manual-hub.com, usermanuals.au) that reproduce the official spec sheet data. The device is powered exclusively via PoE (802.3af, class 3) through the RJ-45 port — there is no separate DC barrel or IEC power inlet on the base unit. The built-in speaker is internal with no external audio connector. Serial ports, IR output, relay outputs, and digital input are only available via the optional TLCA 1 TouchLink Control Port Expansion Adapter, not built into this device. Ethernet grade eth-1g confirmed from "10/100/1000Base-T" spec. USB grade usb-2.0 confirmed from spec listing USB 2.0 high-speed (480 Mbps) Type-A receptacle.

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 10/100/1000Base-T, half/full duplex with autodetect; also serves as PoE power input (802.3af, class 3)

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB 2.0 Type-A receptacle, high-speed (480 Mbps); provides 5 VDC at 275 mA to connected devices
